# Bioprotech Co., Ltd. (㈜바이오프로테크)

> Korean manufacturer of single-use biosensors and medical devices, founded in 2000 and headquartered in Wonju, South Korea, with subsidiaries in the United States (Cerritos, CA) and China (Yantai, Guangzhou). Four product lines: electrosurgery (ESU), cardiology electrodes (ECG), neurodiagnostics (EEG·EMG), and pain management (TENS). Certifications include ISO 13485, CE, and FDA. The site serves Korean, English, and Spanish.

## Products
- Electrosurgery (ESU): Smoke Evacuator, Telescopic Smoke Pencil, Economy Smoke Pencil, Dual Extension Smoke Pencil, Surgical Pencil, Smoke Adapter, Laparoscopic, ESU Plate — https://pujune.github.io/bioprotech-homepage/products/category.html?cat=esu
- Cardiology (ECG): ECG Electrode, TAB Electrode, Neonatal Electrode, SpO2 Sensor — https://pujune.github.io/bioprotech-homepage/products/category.html?cat=cardio
- Neurology (EEG·EMG): EMG Needle & Electrode, EEG Cup Electrode, Surface Electrode, IONM Needle, Neurology Cable — https://pujune.github.io/bioprotech-homepage/products/category.html?cat=neuro
- Pain Management (TENS): TENS Electrode, TENS Unit, EMS Unit, IF Unit — https://pujune.github.io/bioprotech-homepage/products/category.html?cat=pain
- Full catalog: https://pujune.github.io/bioprotech-homepage/products/index.html
